DP.511.0000:
Breathing in this refreshing air...\f
It even perks up Pokémon!
That’s why I’m out here.
DP.511.0001:
Howdy, traveling Trainer.\f
There’s no Gym in this town. You’ll
be wanting Veilstone or Pastoria.
DP.511.0002:
Howdy, traveling Trainer.
Take it easy, slow, and casual.
DP.511.0003:
I’m too little, so I don’t know
how to battle very good.\f
The nice Day-Care Lady is raising
my Pokémon for me.
DP.511.0004:
Every Sunday, I visit the Lost
Tower...
DP.511.0005:
There used to be nothing here but
a road that went straight through.\f
Over time, Pokémon and people just
gathered, and the town came to be.
DP.511.0006:
A traveling Trainer, huh?\f
Tell me, how many kinds of Pokémon
have you met so far?\f
If you’re a competent Trainer, I’d
think you’d’ve met at least fifty.\f
If you haven’t, you ought to go
farther abroad and look harder.
DP.511.0007:
Your encounters with Pokémon can
be considered your shared history.\f
This here’s a Pokétch app called
Pokémon History.\f
Use it to see your history of
Pokémon catches.\f
DP.511.0008:
You have your history, and every
Pokémon has their own history.\f
When the two collide, new drama
is born.
DP.511.0010:
Pokémon Day Care
Let Us Raise Your Pokémon
DP.511.0011:
Pokémon News Press
Wanted: Pro Pokémon Catcher!
